combined_text: Thomas E. Sanders (1953â2017) "SEE RANKThomas E. Sanders (1953–2017)Production Designer | Art Director | Director Thomas E. Sanders was born in 1953 in San Pedro, California, USA. He was a production designer and art director, known for Crimson Peak (2015), Dracula (1992) and Braveheart (1995). He died on July 6, 2017. See full
